headlines.title: 100 million Americans facing dangerous wildfire smoke
headlines.description: That dangerous wildfire smoke from Canada is now on the move and smothering new U.S. cities. NBC News’ Tom Costello has the latest.

headlines.title: Maps: Wildfire smoke forecast for the Midwest and northern U.S.
headlines.description: As heat waves and wildfire smoke sweep the country, see where it could be affecting you on the map and what you can do to curb the health risks.

headlines.title: Trump fumes over Canadian wildfire smoke and issues tariff threat
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Friday pledged to hold Canada responsible for costs associated with unhealthy air quality in the U.S. due to spreading smoke from the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Trump calls for new election security measures
headlines.description: In a primetime address to the nation President Trump castigated the security of the U.S. election system. Critics called out his speech for lacking new evidence to support his claims. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms and Taco Bell removes iceberg lettuce amid parasite outbreak
headlines.description: In a new statement, Taylor Farms says they are voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce from the U.S. market sourced from one Mexican farm. Taco Bell says they have removed all Taylor Farms lettuce from their restaurants and supply chain nationwide. NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports.

headlines.title: Gas prices rise as U.S. and Iran escalate attacks
headlines.description: Oil prices spiked more than four percent today and gas prices are back near four dollars a gallon as traffic through the critical Strait of Hormuz has been dropping while the U.S. and Iran launch new rounds of attacks. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.

headlines.title: Trump fumes over Canadian wildfire smoke and issues tariff threat
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Friday pledged to hold Canada responsible for costs associated with unhealthy air quality in the U.S. due to spreading smoke from the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Two U.S. Forest Service employees rescued after being held hostage at gunpoint
headlines.description: Two U.S. Forest Service employees were rescued with the help of negotiators after being zip-tied and held hostage for nearly 15 hours in Shasta-Trinity National Forest in Northern California, officials said Friday.

headlines.title: Paul Pelosi charged with misdemeanor hit-and-run after hitting parked car in California
headlines.description: Pelosi, who’s married to Democratic Rep. Nancy Pelosi, previously pleaded guilty to driving under the influence in a 2022 car crash.

headlines.description: As heat waves and wildfire smoke sweep the country, see where it could be affecting you on the map and what you can do to curb the health risks.

headlines.title: Trump speech ripple effects: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail.

headlines.title: Democrat moves to drop out of Nebraska’s Senate race, clearing the path for an independent
headlines.description: Nebraska Democratic Senate nominee Cindy Burbank has submitted a letter requesting her name be removed from the ballot, a move that would set up a one-on-one matchup between Republican Sen.
